//: Step 2 of the CSS taxonomy migration (see src/styles/CLASS_TAXONOMY.md).
//rules: Enforces the three rules from CLASS_TAXONOMY.md §Rules: no !important, no raw colour literals outside tokens.css, no px font-sizes in component CSS.
//baseline: Legacy violations live behind `stylelint-disable` comments — the overrides block below scopes that amnesty to src/App.css and src/components/Button/Button.css only. Any NEW CSS file, and any NEW rule in already-clean files, is checked fully.

declaration-no-important.message: CSS taxonomy: no !important — fix the cascade, not the symptom (CLASS_TAXONOMY.md §Rules #2).

color-no-hex.message: CSS taxonomy: no raw colour literals outside tokens.css — add a token instead (CLASS_TAXONOMY.md §Rules #1).

function-disallowed-list.message: CSS taxonomy: no raw rgb()/rgba() outside tokens.css — add a token instead (CLASS_TAXONOMY.md §Rules #1).

declaration-property-unit-disallowed-lis.message: CSS taxonomy: font-size must use the rem-based --text-* scale, not raw px (CLASS_TAXONOMY.md §Shape classes).
